name: receipts
description: Evidence-linked summaries where every claim traces to a verbatim quote from a source file.

interface.shortDescription: Make summaries trace claims back to source quotes.
interface.longDescription: Evidence-linked summaries for postmortems, PR descriptions, research, and feedback digests. The checker verifies that each quote appears in its source and catches altered quotes.
defaultPrompt: Make this claim cite a quote.
